title: LegacyCanEditSign
description: Edit a sign again, But Legacy Fabeic!
body:
This is an extremely simple mod that allows you to edit a sign again by right-clicking it, and it has been open-sourced on GitHub.

Tip: This mod is a client-side only mod. However, even if the server does not have this mod installed, players on the client side can still use the mod normally on the server.
